action_set_definitions.name: get_greenhouse_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current environmental and substrate telemetry from the southern quadrant, including salinity, moisture, and supply levels.

action_set_definitions.name: apply_irrigation
action_set_definitions.description: Dispenses a specific volume of water to the southern quadrant to adjust substrate salinity and moisture content.

volume_liters.description: The volume of water to be pumped in liters.

target_ec.description: The desired target EC_pore for this flushing operation.

action_set_definitions.name: configure_steering
action_set_definitions.description: Sets the growth strategy mode and the minimum dry-back threshold for the system to follow overnight.

target_dryback.description: The percentage moisture drop desired by sunrise.

action_set_definitions.name: advance_time_to_sunrise
action_set_definitions.description: Simulates the evolution of the greenhouse state over the night until sunrise, accounting for moisture evaporation (dry-back) and salinity concentration.

state_description.soil_moisture: The current moisture level of the soil as a percentage (0.0 to 100.0).
state_description.air_temperature: The ambient air temperature inside the greenhouse in degrees Celsius.
state_description.humidity: The relative humidity percentage inside the greenhouse.
state_description.water_tank_level: The remaining water in the irrigation supply tank in liters.
state_description.pump_active: Indicates whether the irrigation pump is currently running.
state_description.light_intensity: The current light intensity measured in Lux.
